blended.narrative: Lost Trail is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,433 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 54".
